issues.title: Packaged desktop capture smoke enumerates and captures its controlled target
reproductionSteps: Build the 0.7.0-b5 NSIS package.
Run node scripts/desktop-smoke.mjs.
Observe DESKTOP_SMOKE_TARGET_MISSING and no successful structured result.

issues.title: Production code-signing certificate and signed artifacts are unavailable
reproductionSteps: Build the installer.
Run Get-AuthenticodeSignature against installer and unpacked application.
Observe NotSigned.

evidence.dependency: trusted Windows code-signing certificate and timestamp service

issues.title: Update and rollback have no clean-machine production evidence
reproductionSteps: Publish a signed Creator Preview release manifest.
Upgrade a clean supported installation.
Interrupt activation and prove atomic rollback.
Repeat with a failed health check.

issues.title: Release gates are not yet observed in the hosted CI environment
reproductionSteps: Push the B-6 workflow.
Observe fast gates and the release-corpus job on GitHub Actions.
Record the immutable run URL and result.

issues.title: Three independent real Sea of Thieves locked pilot corpora do not exist
reproductionSteps: Capture separate build, calibration, validation, locked-positive, locked-negative, and regression partitions for three pilot waypoints.
Obtain human truth labels.
Run the locked B-6 replay without threshold tuning.

issues.title: Required hardware, display, game-impact, and long-duration matrix is incomplete
reproductionSteps: Run the documented matrix on each available hardware/provider/display configuration.
Measure capture, inference, memory, GPU memory, CPU, game frame time, startup, idle, and package load.
Run interruption and long-duration scenarios.

issues.title: Clean-machine install, upgrade, uninstall, and retained-data matrix is unexecuted
reproductionSteps: Run the installation matrix on clean non-administrator Windows accounts.
Test install, repair, upgrade, interrupted install, uninstall with preservation, complete removal, and reinstall.
Record installer logs and filesystem/registry observations.

issues.title: External creator cohort and uninvolved Player/Captain studies are unexecuted
reproductionSteps: Recruit the three required participant profiles.
Run the unassisted authoring and recovery scenario.
Run uninvolved Player and Captain tasks and record interventions, errors, confidence, and accessibility findings.

issues.title: Independent B-6 security and privacy validation is not complete
reproductionSteps: Run the repeatable security and privacy suite.
Review the localhost, desktop command, package, update, secret, retention, and diagnostic boundaries.
Obtain independent review and record findings.

issues.title: Rive runtime is staged locally from the pinned npm dependency
reproductionSteps: Run the Playwright animation showcase without network access.
Observe attempted unpkg and jsDelivr WASM requests before fallback.

issues.title: Installer uses the default Electron executable icon
reproductionSteps: Build the NSIS installer.
Observe electron-builder warning that the application icon is not set.

issues.title: Rare or Microsoft public-distribution clarification remains unresolved
reproductionSteps: Obtain and archive the required written clarification for the current non-injected local capture design.
Review any imposed distribution or branding conditions before public release.
